```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.5em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1.6fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);border-left:4px solid #2C8475;">
   <div>
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.7em;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">CLAUDE.md</code>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:0.15em;">always behave</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;">every session</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#2C8475;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:999px;text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">always loaded</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;font-style:italic;">"always do this"</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1.6fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);border-left:4px solid #C4881A;">
   <div>
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.7em;color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">rules/*.md</code>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:0.15em;">when to know</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;">topical knowledge</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#C4881A;background:#FEF5E7;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:999px;text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">on demand</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;font-style:italic;">"when you need to know X"</div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1.6fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.7em 1em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);border-left:4px solid #5654A2;">
   <div>
    <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">skills/X/SKILL.md</code>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:0.15em;">when to do</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;">reusable workflow</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#5654A2;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.2em 0.5em;border-radius:999px;text-align:center;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">on invoke</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;font-style:italic;">"when you need to do X"</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
